message:
fix(beads): restore BEADS_DIR stripping in buildRunEnv() lost in merge (gt-by4q7h)

Commit a66c97fe added BEADS_DIR stripping to run() to prevent inherited
env vars from shadowing the explicit value (getenv returns first match).
The telemetry merge at 4f3d6a78 regressed this: the inline stripping was
refactored into buildRunEnv() but the function just returned os.Environ()
without filtering. This caused bd create to use the wrong database when
BEADS_DIR was set in the parent environment, producing "issue_prefix
config is missing" errors during polecat spawn.

Fix: buildRunEnv() now strips BEADS_DIR using the same stripEnvPrefixes()
helper already used by buildRoutingEnv(). Also fix the same pattern in
EnsureCustomTypes() and ensureDatabaseInitialized() which directly called
append(os.Environ(), "BEADS_DIR=...").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
